title: Guns n Stuffs
description: Modpack for those who want to have realistic gun play
body:
🏷 Guns n' Stuffs – Combat-Focused Minecraft Modpack

Guns n' Stuffs transforms Minecraft into an action-packed survival and combat experience. Built for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge), this modpack focuses on realistic firearms, challenging enemies, and plenty of gear to customize your playstyle.

🔫 Key Features

Firearms & Modern Combat: Arm yourself with a wide range of guns, including assault rifles, shotguns, pistols, and more. Realistic models and mechanics bring intense firefights to Minecraft.

Challenging Mobs & Bosses: Encounter tougher, smarter enemies with enhanced AI and new boss encounters that will test your reflexes and tactics.

Exploration & Loot: Discover scattered structures, hidden stashes, and high-risk areas filled with valuable loot. Stay alert – danger is always around the corner.

Performance-Friendly: Designed to deliver great visuals and gameplay without overloading your system. Perfect for single-player survival or cooperative multiplayer adventures.

Immersive Visuals: Enjoy improved lighting, textures, and particle effects with built-in shader support, making your gunfights feel even more cinematic.

🛡️ Who It’s For

Players who want modern gunplay in Minecraft.

Survival fans looking for high-stakes combat and better AI.

Groups seeking co-op friendly adventures with tactical depth.

Whether you're taking down hostile mobs, raiding outposts for better gear, or surviving wave after wave of enemy attacks, Guns n' Stuffs delivers the ultimate combat-focused Minecraft experience.
